name: Screw Out 3D: Relax Unwind
description: A deeply satisfying 3D puzzle game designed to help you relax, focus, and unwind. Feeling stressed or overwhelmed? Take a break and enjoy the simple pleasure of removing screws, one by one. Screw Out 3D combines relaxing gameplay with realistic physics to create a calming yet engaging puzzle experience.
instructions: bull Tap to choose the right screwdriver bull Rotate your finger to loosen each screw bull Watch objects dismantle smoothly with realistic 3D physics
